Answer format: for true/false questions reply with exactly one word, true or false. For list questions reply with a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

Question: On day 360, across frames [actual, product_23, product_16, product_14], list every customer value X such that registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_18, asset=asset_00, customer=?X) holds, labeling each value with the frame it holds in. Answer as (value, frame) pairs (possibly empty).
Structured form: {"at_day":360,"find_slot":"customer","pattern":{"relation":"rel_b00_registered_in","args":{"asset":{"const":"asset_00"},"customer":{"var":"X"},"jurisdiction":{"const":"jurisdiction_18"}}}}
